description: Create a content slide titled 'Some key numbers on how the global public is feeling' with a 2x2 grid of donut charts comparing 2024 in retrospect and outlook for 2025, using a two-column layout.

header.headline: Some key numbers on how the global public is feeling

steps.label: on average across 31 countries say “2024 was a bad year for my country”, down from 70% last year and 73% the year before.
on average across 31 countries say “2024 was a bad year for me and my family”, down from 53% last year and 56% the year before.
on average across 31 countries say they are “optimistic that next year will be a better year than this year”, up from 70% last year and 65% the year before.
on average across 31 countries say “The global economy will be stronger next year than it was this year”, up from 50% last year and 46% the year before.
